infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to take photos of work schedules for import.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to select photos of work schedules for import.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Used to send daily to-do reminders.

plugins.photosPermission: Sarian needs access to your photos to import work schedules.
plugins.cameraPermission: Sarian needs your camera to photograph work schedules.
